name: CopilotKit Communications Coach
purpose: Embed a CopilotKit sidebar in KakaoDashboard that acts as a communications coach. It advises on tone, Korean business register, marketing rhetoric, and drafts replies — but never sends. The operator is always in the loop. This is a read-observe-suggest system, not an automation layer.
design_intent: Human-in-the-loop first. The coach reads conversation context from PostgreSQL (chat_history), suggests phrasing, and lets the operator copy-paste into the Kakao admin center. No message is ever sent automatically. Toggle-able. PII never leaves the server boundary unredacted.
prerequisite: Phase 5 (Auto-Reply) must be DONE and KAKAO_DB_ENABLED=true. Coach requires PostgreSQL chat_history for meaningful context.
isolation_guarantee: No Kakao module may import or call publisher, scheduler, or observer code. CopilotKit modules live under src/copilot/ and lib/copilotCoach.ts only.

in: CopilotSidebar embedded in KakaoDashboard — visible when COPILOTKIT_ENABLED=true
useCopilotReadable — feeds selected conversation thread (last 20 turns) + user subscription status
Coach event logging — tracks suggestion shown/applied/edited/dismissed
PII scrubbing — strips bank account, phone, email before sending context to LLM
Conversation thread selector UI in KakaoDashboard
out: Auto-sending any message to Kakao (this remains Phase 5 / KAKAO_AUTOREPLY_ENABLED territory)
Publisher, scheduler, or observer interaction of any kind
CopilotKit on any page other than KakaoDashboard

context_model.description: What the coach 'sees' at runtime via useCopilotReadable

sources.name: active_thread
sources.query: SELECT direction, utterance, created_at FROM chat_history WHERE user_key = $1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
sources.purpose: The live conversation the operator is looking at

sources.name: user_profile
sources.query: SELECT user_key, first_seen, last_active, user_properties FROM kakao_users WHERE user_key = $1
sources.purpose: Basic profile — first contact date, last active, any stored properties

sources.name: intent_summary
sources.description: Top 3 intent labels from annotated chat_history for this user_key
sources.purpose: Lets coach understand what the user typically wants
sources.migration_note: chat_history currently has intent VARCHAR(50) only. Phase 3 annotation labels (topic[], sentiment) live in data/kakao-annotated/conversations.jsonl and are NOT in PostgreSQL. Sprint 6a must add ALTER TABLE chat_history ADD COLUMN labels JSONB to expose full annotation context. Until migration runs, intent_summary queries intent field only.

sources.name: operator_style_hint
sources.description: Static prompt fragment describing SharePlan's preferred tone: casual-but-professional, Korean business register, concise, no filler phrases

sources.name: rules_engine
sources.description: Hardcoded service constraint block injected into every LLM call. Prevents hallucination of impossible service options (e.g., top-offs, extensions).
sources.source: hardcoded in lib/copilotCoach.ts COACH_SYSTEM_PROMPT as a non-negotiable rules block
sources.content: Service rules (non-negotiable — never contradict these): No top-offs or extensions on existing slots. A new Google Family invite is required after expiry. 6-month plan: ₩25,000. 12-month plan: ₩50,000. Payment via IBK bank transfer only. If a user asks about extending, the only correct path is a new subscription.

context_model.context_cap: Last 20 turns only. Never full history. Prevents token overflow and limits PII exposure surface.

pii_scrubbing.description: Applied server-side in lib/copilotCoach.ts before context is passed to CopilotRuntime
pii_scrubbing.strategy: Two-pass. Pass 1 is fast regex. Pass 2 is keyword-triggered and catches space/dot-separated formats that bypass Pass 1.

pass_2_keyword.label: bank_account_unformatted
pass_2_keyword.action: If trigger word present in utterance, redact any adjacent run of 8+ digits (with or without spaces/dashes) as [ACCOUNT]

pass_2_keyword.label: phone_unformatted
pass_2_keyword.action: If trigger word present, redact any adjacent 10-11 digit sequence as [PHONE]

pii_scrubbing.validation: Unit tests in tests/copilotCoach.pii.test.ts must cover all four regex types AND both keyword-trigger cases (space-separated account, dotted phone) before Sprint 6d is marked DONE
pii_scrubbing.audit_log: Each scrub event is counted and logged as copilot_event type=pii_scrub in coach_events table

actions.name: draftReply
actions.description: Generate a complete reply to the current conversation in SharePlan's natural style. Operator reviews before copying.

actions.name: refineMessage
actions.description: Rewrite a draft the operator has typed for better rhetoric, politeness level, or marketing framing.

actions.name: suggestFollowUp
actions.description: Given the conversation state, suggest the most appropriate next message to move the subscription flow forward.
actions.output: text — suggested next message with brief reasoning

actions.name: translateToKorean
actions.description: Translate or localize a message into natural Korean with correct business register (존댓말).

logging.description: All coach interactions are logged for quality review and future fine-tuning
logging.table: coach_events (new PostgreSQL table in shareplan schema)

schema.user_key: VARCHAR(255) — the Kakao user being coached on (nullable if no thread selected)
schema.action_name: VARCHAR(50) — which useCopilotAction was invoked, or 'sidebar_open'
schema.event_type: VARCHAR(30) — suggestion_shown | applied | edited | dismissed | pii_scrub | error
schema.input_length: INT — character count of context sent to LLM
schema.output_length: INT — character count of suggestion returned
schema.latency_ms: INT — wall-clock time from action call to response
schema.operator_edited: BOOLEAN — true if operator changed the suggestion before use

logging.migration: Added in Sprint 6a via CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS in lib/kakaoDb.ts ensureReady()
logging.retention: No automatic purge. Review after 30 days of prod use.

runtime_model.rationale: gpt-4o for coach (richer reasoning than gpt-4o-mini used by auto-reply). Same OPENAI_API_KEY env var — no new credential.

server_architecture.context_api: GET /api/kakao/thread/:userKey — returns last 20 turns with PII scrubbed, suitable for useCopilotReadable
server_architecture.kill_switch_check: Middleware on POST /api/copilotkit returns 503 if COPILOTKIT_ENABLED=false

new_files: src/copilot/ThreadSelector.tsx — dropdown/list to pick which user_key to coach on
frontend_architecture.layout: KakaoDashboard splits into two columns when COPILOTKIT_ENABLED: left = existing log terminal + stats, right = CoachSidebar
frontend_architecture.toggle_visibility: CoachSidebar only mounts when status.copilotEnabled === true (fetched from /api/kakao/status)

env_additions.effect: Kill-switch. When false, POST /api/copilotkit returns 503 and CoachSidebar is hidden.
Number of most recent chat_history turns fed into useCopilotReadable. Max 50 for cost control.

inbound_payload.description: Validation applied to POST /api/copilotkit body before reaching CopilotRuntime
rules: action name must be one of the four defined actions
tone/style/register must be one of the defined enum values — reject unknown values with 400

context_payload.description: Validation applied to GET /api/kakao/thread/:userKey response before useCopilotReadable
rules: user_key must exist in kakao_users table — 404 if not
PII scrub applied before response is returned
Total context character count capped at 8000 chars (GPT-4o context budget)
draftReply output truncated to 400 chars with ellipsis if LLM exceeds limit
Never return raw JSON — always plain text string to the CopilotAction handler

safety_constraints: Coach never sends a message. All output is copy-paste only. No Kakao API call is made from CopilotKit code paths.
COPILOTKIT_ENABLED defaults to false. Must be explicitly opted in.
COPILOTKIT_ENABLED requires KAKAO_DB_ENABLED=true — log warning and reject if DB is off.
PII scrubbing runs server-side before any LLM call. It is not optional.
coach_events logging is mandatory — if the DB insert fails, log a warning but do not fail the action.
No cross-import between copilot modules and publisher/scheduler/observer code.

phase_roadmap.name: Infrastructure
deliverables: npm install @copilotkit/react-core @copilotkit/react-ui @copilotkit/runtime
COPILOTKIT_ENABLED + COPILOT_CONTEXT_TURNS added to config/env.ts
POST /api/copilotkit endpoint in server.ts — 503 when disabled
lib/copilotCoach.ts — CopilotRuntime setup, COACH_SYSTEM_PROMPT, model wiring
coach_events table + labels JSONB column on chat_history both added in lib/kakaoDb.ts ensureReady() (ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS labels JSONB)
GET /api/kakao/thread/:userKey — returns PII-scrubbed last N turns
/api/kakao/status extended to include copilotEnabled field
phase_roadmap.acceptance: POST /api/copilotkit returns valid CopilotKit response; 503 when disabled; coach_events table exists

phase_roadmap.name: Context Wiring + Sidebar Shell
deliverables: src/copilot/ThreadSelector.tsx — lists kakao_users from /api/kakao/db-stats, lets operator pick one
src/copilot/CoachSidebar.tsx — CopilotSidebar shell with useCopilotReadable wired to selected thread
KakaoDashboard.tsx updated: two-column layout when copilotEnabled, ThreadSelector above log terminal
useCopilotReadable feeds: active_thread, user_profile, intent_summary, operator_style_hint
phase_roadmap.acceptance: Sidebar renders in dashboard; selecting a user populates Copilot context; sidebar is hidden when COPILOTKIT_ENABLED=false

phase_roadmap.name: Actions (Coach Capabilities)
deliverables: useCopilotAction: draftReply — generate reply in SharePlan style
useCopilotAction: refineMessage — rewrite operator draft for tone/style
useCopilotAction: suggestFollowUp — next message in subscription flow
useCopilotAction: translateToKorean — localize with 존댓말 register
Each action logs to coach_events on completion
phase_roadmap.acceptance: All four actions callable from sidebar; output is plain text; no Kakao API call is triggered; events appear in coach_events

phase_roadmap.name: PII Validation + Quality Logging
deliverables: PII scrubbing two-pass suite in lib/copilotCoach.ts scrubContext() — regex pass + keyword-triggered pass
tests/copilotCoach.pii.test.ts — covers all four regex types plus space-separated account and dotted phone edge cases

operator_edited field populated via CoachSidebar UX: after copy button is clicked, show two feedback chips ('Used as-is' / 'Edited it') — chip selection writes operator_edited boolean to coach_events with no clipboard permission required
latency_ms tracked per action call
Dashboard section in KakaoDashboard: coach event summary (total suggestions shown, apply rate)
phase_roadmap.acceptance: All PII tests pass; coach event summary visible in dashboard; latency logged for all four actions

open_questions: COPILOT_CONTEXT_TURNS default of 20 — validate against GPT-4o token budget with real chat_history row sizes before Sprint 6b. Also consider always pinning the first message of the thread so the original complaint is never lost when context window is full.
System prompt language: English prompt yields better LLM instruction-following but Korean examples needed. Hybrid prompt TBD.
Coach event retention: no purge policy set. Decide after 30 days of data.
